summary: Hydrated live state shows no security-sensitive items and no safe closeout. This is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster; each open PR is classified independently. Merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout are disabled by the job, so maintainer or technical-review decisions remain for the open PRs.
